steps.title: Write the final-depth pressure
steps.content:
After descending $d$ additional meters from depth $h$, the final depth is $h+d$. Substitute that into the pressure model.
$$P_2=10(h+d)+101=10h+10d+101$$

steps.title: Compare the two formulas
steps.content:
The problem also gives
$$P_2=10d+331$$
So the constant part must match the starting-depth pressure.
$$10h+101=331$$

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content: The expression $10h+101$ is the total pressure at the diver's original depth, just before descending the additional $d$ meters. The answer is D.
